text:
Created attachment 234657
v1

Moin moin 

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade KDE Frameworks to 5.95.

The patch is attached, but can also be found here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.94.patch

mfg Tobias
